zh.lifeSummary: 當Philippa Buckton於1377年出生在英國英格蘭素福爾可布洛時，她的父親Robert de Bucton36歲，母親Anne Braham34歲。她於大約1398年與John Cornwallis Sr在英國英格蘭素福爾可布洛 煙雨 歐克麗結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1427年在英國英格蘭素福爾可享年50歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭素福爾可歐克麗。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Philippa Buckton于1377年出生在英国英格兰素福爾可布洛时，她的父亲Robert de Bucton36岁，母亲Anne Braham34岁。她于大约1398年与John Cornwallis Sr在英国英格兰素福爾可布洛 煙雨 歐克麗结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1427年在英国英格兰素福爾可享年50岁，埋葬在英国英格兰素福爾可歐克麗。

nameMeanings.name: Buckton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name probably from Buckton in ER Yorks (rather than Herefs or Northumb) or possibly from Buckden in WR Yorks (rather than Hunts).   Redmonds, Dictionary of Yorks Surnames   notes that a 16th-century family in Marsk (Swaledale, NR Yorks) was known as both Buckton and Buckden. For possible medieval forms  see  Boughton  .  Compare  Bugden  .

variants.name: Bugden
meanings: English: (i) locative name from either of two places called Buckden (Hunts, WR Yorks).  Compare  Buckton  . (ii) variant of   Boughton  .

variants.name: Redmonds, Dictionary of Yorks Surnames
meanings: English: locative name, probably from Gilderdale (Forest) in Alston (Cumb), as suggested by   Redmonds, Dictionary of Yorks Surnames  , rather than from Gildersdale in Warter (ER Yorks), as suggested by   Reaney and Wilson  .

variants.name: Boughton
meanings: English: habitational name from any of numerous places so named. Those in Cambridgeshire (formerly Huntingdonshire), Lincolnshire, Norfolk, Northamptonshire, and Nottinghamshire are named from Old English bucc ‘goat’ or the Old English byname Bucca with the same meaning (see Buck 1) + Old English tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’; those in Cheshire and Kent are named with Old English bōc ‘beech’ + tūn.

nameMeanings.name: Philippa
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: feminine form of Philip . In England during the Middle Ages the vernacular name Philip was borne by women as well as men, but female bearers were distinguished in Latin records by this form. It was not, however, used as a regular given name until the 19th century.

en.lifeSummary: When Philippa Buckton was born in 1377, in Brome, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, her father, Robert de Bucton, was 36 and her mother, Anne Braham, was 34. She married John Cornwallis Sr about 1398, in Brome with Oakley, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1427, in Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 50, and was buried in Oakley, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom.

Elle a épousé John Cornwallis Sr environ 1398, à Brome with Oakley, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 1 fille. de.lifeSummary: Als Philippa Buckton 1377 in Brome, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Robert de Bucton 36 und ihre Mutter Anne Braham 34. Sie hat um 1398 in Brome with Oakley, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom John Cornwallis Sr geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1427 im Alter von 50 Jahren in Suffolk, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Oakley, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom begraben.

ko.lifeSummary: Philippa Buckton(이)가 1377년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 브롬에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert de Bucton(은)는 36세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Anne Braham(은)는 34세였다. 그녀는 대략 1398년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 브롬 위스 클리에서 John Cornwallis Sr(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1427년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크에서 50세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 클리에 묻혔다.

Ela casou-se com John Cornwallis Sr aproximadamente 1398, em Brome with Oakley, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1427, em Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 50 anos, e foi sepultada em Oakley, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Philippa Buckton родилась в 1377 г. в местности бром, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Robert de Bucton было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Anne Braham, 34. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Cornwallis Sr около 1398 г. в местности бром вит оакли, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1427 г. в местности суффолк, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 50 лет и была похоронена в местности оакли, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания.
